analysis_summary: TinyURL is a minimal public URL shortening service with abuse handling and click analytics.
product_vision: A reliable, frictionless URL-shortening service that turns long URLs into short shareable slugs and provides per-link click analytics.
product_description: TinyURL is a minimal HTTP service that converts long URLs into short 6-character slugs and instantly redirects traffic to the original destination. It operates without user authentication and focuses on link compression and reliable delivery.

personas.name: Link Sharer
personas.description: Submits long URLs to receive short slugs.

personas.name: Link Clicker
personas.description: Follows short URLs and expects fast, reliable redirection.

constraints.text: All URLs persisted are encrypted at rest.
